visualFindings: Legacy horizontal torso slab artifact is removed after filtering generated tunic meshes before fitting.
Imported polo is not visibly worn on the torso; the avatar appears mostly unclothed in the close-up view.

nextFitterHypothesis: Normalize imported garment mesh bounds to the humanoid upper-torso target volume before shrinkwrap instead of trusting source OBJ coordinates or origin.
